arts.ttl: Jack Grealish 'open' to leaving Man City for Premier League rivals
arts.sum: Jack Grealish has struggled to earn the trust of Pep Guardiola in the 2024/25 season and has regularly been on the substitutes bench.

arts.sum: The Three Lions begin their journey under Tuchel as qualifying for the 2026 World Cup gets underway

arts.ttl: Kane compares himself to Messi and Ronaldo: 'I'm taken for granted!'
arts.sum: "It's like when [Cristiano] Ronaldo and [Lionel] Messi were throwing these crazy numbers out there and the next season they'd score 40 goals instead of 50," Kane began. Albania, Latvia and Gibraltar were held up as examples of teams England are expected to steamroll, thus taking away from the importance and excitement surrounding Three Lions games.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Myles Lewis-Skelly reveals hilarious phone call blunder when he mistook Uber Eats for England boss Thomas Tuchel
arts.sum: In the latest episode of England Generations, accompanied by Dan Burn and Declan Rice, the 18-year-old disclosed his nervous wait for a call-up for the national team.

arts.ttl: England vs Albania: Three dropped for match squad
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel has opted to leave out Morgan Gibbs-White, Jarell Quansah and Aaron Ramsdale for his opening game as England manager against Albania.

arts.ttl: England: Three major selection decisions facing Thomas Tuchel for first game

arts.ttl: Tuchel and Kane take aim at Euros campaign before England v Albania: football – live
arts.sum: Scathing assessment of Euros displays under Southgate Football Daily | Football Weekly Extra | And email Luke Morgan Rogers is pushing for a starting spot in attack when the Thomas Tuchel era begins with England’s World Cup qualifier against Albania tonight. Rogers, who can play in a variety of roles in attacking midfield, has been in fine form for Aston Villa this season and has done well in training this week. He has not started for England yet but could feature as the No 10 against Albania, with Jude Bellingham in a slightly deeper role with Declan Rice. Continue reading...

arts.sum: Manchester United have realised that they need a new centre-back in the summer transfer window and they have already started working towards it. The Red Devils are expected to lose both Victor Lindelof and Jonny Evans after this season. Even though they already have the likes of Leny Yoro, Matthijs de Ligt, Lisandro Martinez. arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel Cuts 3 Players From England Squad For Albania Game

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel 'drops three England players' for Albania match including Liverpool, Nottingham Forest talents
arts.sum: England head coach Thomas Tuchel reportedly omits three players from his matchday squad to face Albania in Friday's World Cup 2026 Qualifying match at Wembley.
